items.headline: British Open to return to Royal Lytham in 2028 as Trump's Turnberry course made to wait
items.description:
The long wait to stage the British Open again will soon be over for Royal Lytham & St. Annes.
It goes on and on for President Donald Trump's Turnberry course.

items.headline: The Mets, Red Sox and Phillies aren't out -- but they're very much down
items.description:
Alex Cora was fired as manager of the Boston Red Sox over the weekend.
That news could have come from any of three major markets.

items.headline: Simons out of World Cup and Spurs relegation fight

items.headline: Rays visit the Guardians to open 3-game series
items.description:

Cleveland; Monday, 6:10 p.m. EDT
